gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/114)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/114)
text: كَانَ أَبُو الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) إِذَا أَكَلَ أَحَدُنَا لَا يَسْتَخْدِمُهُ حَتَّى يَفْرُغَ مِنْ طَعَامِهِ .

en.hubeali: And it is reported from Nadir the servant who said,
‘Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup>, whenever one of us (servants) was eating, would not get him to attend to something until he was free from his meal’.
en.sarwar: 11. It is narrated from Nadir al-Khadim who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, would not ask us to work when we were eating until we finished eating.’”
